characters.name: Teddy O Polvo
characters.description: Teddy O Polvois a character by Xuxa made exclusively for her "Só Para Baixinhos" series. He is a tall, red octopus with yellow hair. He first appeared inthe first Só Para Baixinhos, specifically in "Teddy, O Polvo". He later appears in every Só Para Baixinhos untilSó Para Baixinhos 8.

characters.name: Txutxucão
characters.description: Txutxucãois a character by Xuxa made exclusively for her "Só Para Baixinhos" series. He is a tall, orange dog. He first appeared inSó Para Baixinhos 2, specifically in "Dançando Com O Txutxucão". He later appears in every Só Para Baixinhos.
